g.title: acq.provider:edi_default->acq.edi_account:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (edi_default) REFERENCES acq.edi_account(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.provider:primary_contact->acq.provider_contact:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (primary_contact) REFERENCES acq.provider_contact(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
